title: Magical Relics
description: Randomly generated magic items, dungeons and traps
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e1d7cc1feecaf36a4af89cb2d8c9ebfaf3e1477.png) Randomly generated magic items and deceiving dungeons! ====================================================== (A port/continuation of Draco\_18s' old Artifacts mod) ------------------------------------------------------ Link to original project: [https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291999-unique-artifacts-powerful-randomly-generated-items](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1291999-unique-artifacts-powerful-randomly-generated-items) ![An abandoned wizard tower high up in the snowy mountains. Who knows what you might find in there?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caca195e2db2b2fb7d11dbcbff0806c326f43878.png) **Do you like exploring the world, dungeons with whacky contraptions and magic items that can do anything from summoning cakes to allow sneaking in the air? If that is the case, this mod might interest you!** Magical Relics adds a variety of new structures and dungeons filled with glorious loot and unique traps, designed to troll anyone who dares to try get their hands on any magic items! **"What magic items?"** I hear you ask. You won't know until you look for yourself! Many of these new dungeons hold randomly generated magical artifacts. You might get a wand, staff, dagger, belt, trinket, axe or anything inbetween, with completely randomly picked abilities, so you never know what you might find!

**An assortment of random artifacts:** -------------------------------------- ![An assortment of random artifacts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eIeAhvl5/images/eb69b5d4329deb30518a8f1ce883321d4cde5ada.png) ![Artifact example 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eIeAhvl5/images/44c8211a0b5692ce6edd6d7c6727575adc3fb74e.png) ![Artifact example 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eIeAhvl5/images/3cb3bc247b0041841f1fe5b86b1aa8c8c99ea95f.png)
